scripts.hosted:preflight: node scripts/hosted_android_preflight.mjs && node --check apps/web/public/sw.js && cd apps/api && ../../.tools/uv/bin/uv run python -m py_compile ../../scripts/migrate_sqlite_to_postgres.py

scripts.test:api: cd apps/api && TOOLS_DIR=../../.tools; if [ ! -x "$TOOLS_DIR/uv/bin/uv" ] && [ -x "../../../../.tools/uv/bin/uv" ]; then TOOLS_DIR=../../../../.tools; fi; env UV_CACHE_DIR="$TOOLS_DIR/uv-cache" "$TOOLS_DIR/uv/bin/uv" run python -m unittest discover -s tests
scripts.compile:api: cd apps/api && TOOLS_DIR=../../.tools; if [ ! -x "$TOOLS_DIR/uv/bin/uv" ] && [ -x "../../../../.tools/uv/bin/uv" ]; then TOOLS_DIR=../../../../.tools; fi; env UV_CACHE_DIR="$TOOLS_DIR/uv-cache" "$TOOLS_DIR/uv/bin/uv" run python -m compileall -q src tests
scripts.check: pnpm test:api && pnpm compile:api && pnpm test:web:state
